value.found_quote: When you start an agent, the SDK runs the same execution loop that powers Claude Code: Claude evaluates your prompt, calls tools to take action, receives the results, and repeats until the task is complete... The SDK includes the same tools that power Claude Code: [File operations: Read, Edit, Write | Search: Glob, Grep | Execution: Bash | Web: WebSearch, WebFetch | Discovery: ToolSearch | Orchestration: Agent, Skill, AskUserQuestion, TaskCreate, TaskUpdate]
value.name: Agent loop
